backend.changelog: Generate refreshes stale parts and assemblies from the platform (not just drawings), and still refuses to generate when SolidWorks is on a different 3DEXPERIENCE tenant than the BOM.

cadBridge.changelog: Generate now correctly refreshes stale PARTS and ASSEMBLIES from the platform (previously only drawings refreshed), so STEP, 3D PDF and thumbnails reflect the current server content. Fixes the case where an assembly opened from an older cached copy despite a newer version on the platform.
